name: 深情備胎×冷漠丈夫
description: Noah和Richard形成鮮明對比——一個默默守護八年，一個三年不聞不問。這種對比讓觀眾既心疼女主又替她感到不值，同時製造「她該選誰」的追劇動力。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Noah: I've loved you for 8 years. I'm not leaving now or ever. ... Richard: She doesn't want you. I'm her husband. I think I know what she wants. Noah: Yeah, then you would have treated her better.
examples.context: Noah和Richard形成鮮明對比——一個默默守護八年，一個三年不聞不問。這種對比讓觀眾既心疼女主又替她感到不值，同時製造「她該選誰」的追劇動力。
